text: China urges 'restraint' in Ukraine war after Russian hypersonic missile strike - Glenda KWEK, Glenda KWEK - Updated [Comments](/china-urges-restraint-in-ukraine-war-after-russian-hypersonic-missile-strike/image_45c72ad8-68e8-59bb-8ed9-86d3fa75ea22.html#comments) Tags As featured on Russian President Vladimir Putin on Friday promised more combat test-firing of an experimental hypersonic missile launched at Ukraine, as Volodymyr Zelensky appealed for updated air-defence systems to meet the new threat.
